title: Create GitHub issue for automating smoke tests into CI pipeline

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
comments.content: Creating a GitHub issue to track automation of 13 smoke/manual tests identified in audit of PRs #175-#225. Tests will be tiered to match CI pipeline: fast unit/integration tests for feature branches, heavier git-fixture tests for develop/release gates.

comments.author: maxine-at-forecast--noether
comments.content: Created GitHub issue forecast-bio/crosslink#242 with full tiered breakdown of 13 smoke tests to automate. Tier 1 (unit) and Tier 2 (integration) run on all branches; Tier 3 (hub sync fixtures) gates develop/release only.
